title: Amcor to report Third Quarter 2022 Year to Date Results
text: ZURICH , April 19, 2022 /PRNewswire/ -- Amcor plc (NYSE: AMCR; ASX: AMC) will announce its year to date results for the nine months ended 31 March 2022 after the US market closes on Tuesday 3 May 2021.   A conference call and webcast to discuss the results will be held at 5.30pm US Eastern Daylight Time on Tuesday 3 May 2022 / 7.30am Australian Eastern Standard Time on Wednesday 4 May 2022.

title: 10 Ideal April Dividend Buys Unleashed From Potent Picks
text: February 2, 2022, A Kiplinger Today special report featured "Potent Picks to Profit in 2022". This article features 98 dividend-fetching stocks out of 119 per YCharts 4/7/22 data.
